title: Harvestcraft Fix
description: A few typos corrected and tags added for Pam's Harvestcraft 2.
body:
Intended for use with Pam's Harvestcraft 2, Core, Crop, Trees, and Extended.


- Fixed recipe for Sunchoke Seeds, and added the #seeds tag
- Corrected typo in display names of Hazelnut Coffee, Honey Sandwich, River Mud Cake, and Maple Syrup
- Tagged oranges and persimmons as #citrusfruits
- Tagged cooked cooked tofu meats as the appropriate cooked meats
- Tagged fortune cookies, gingersnaps, lavender shortbread, oatmeal raisin cookies, sugar cookies, and timtams as #cookies
- Tagged ginger, garlic, mustard, spiceleaf, chili pepper, edible roots, fivespice, miso paste, and peppermint as #spices
- Added a crafting recipe for ground fish using the #forge:raw_fishes tag in addition to the existing #forge:fishes tag recipe
- Added a smoker recipe for raisins, using any tagged #berries
